build-join: Tap a friend to join the band!
build-instrument: Tap an instrument to hear it!
full-band: Your band is full! Tap Play Show!
solo-hint: Tap a puppet for a solo!
play-again: Play again, or try a new song!
song-teddy-parade: March along with Teddy Bear Parade!
song-cloud-waltz: Time to twirl! It's Cloud Waltz!
song-gamelan-garden: Ding dong! Welcome to Gamelan Garden!
